name: the consumer-compatibility gate is green: every rule epoch-tagged, every enforcement field has an absent_default, contract present
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-consumer-compatibility.sh" 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green rules=118 untagged=0 undeclared_fields=0' e.txt && echo consumer-compat-green 1>&2
